properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT access tokens. Must be at least 256 bits in production.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT access token expiration time in milliseconds. Default: 900000 (15 minutes).

properties.name: jwt.refresh-expiration
properties.description: JWT refresh token expiration time in milliseconds. Default: 604800000 (7 days).

properties.name: jwt.header
properties.description: HTTP header name for the JWT token. Default: Authorization.

properties.name: jwt.prefix
properties.description: Token prefix in the Authorization header. Default: Bearer.

properties.name: nidaa.admin.email
properties.description: Platform admin email address used for system notifications.
